◎简　　介  

　　The story of how social networks and instant messengers are changing the life of a modern person. It has been several years since a 16-year-old teenager posted a photo of his girlfriend in the general chat, hoping to boast to friends. Now he has a happy adult life: work, friends, bride Katya, who is about to become his wife. But the Internet makes you remember teenage love, aft...
